Better Habits for People in a Hurry

The Habits Academy is an online course that will teach you exactly how to form
good habits and break bad ones as quickly as possible. Each lesson covers
powerful ways to improve your habits based on proven research.
The Habits Academy is a simple, science-backed program that works. It is the
most practical and effective course you will find.

The Habits Academy is the most practical, effective,

and science-backed course on behavior change ever

created.

Here are some of the benefits of the course...

+ Learn how to break your bad habits. Identify the root causes of your
bad habits and cut them off at the source.

+ Learn how to build good habits that last. Get a simple plan to
overhaul your habits.

+ Learn how to stop procrastinating. I'll hand you some proven
methods that make it easier to get started and follow through on what you
set out to do.

* Learn how to overcome failure and setbacks. Learn how to bounce
back from adversity and get back on track quickly when you fall off the
wagon.

+ Learn how to get more out of yourself than ever before. Learn
how to build the habits you need to realize your full potential.

Plain and simple, this course will help you improve your habits. Even if you
don't have much time. Even if you aren't sure how to begin. And even if you
have failed in the past.
You don't have to take my word for it.

Forming good habits and breaking bad ones
doesn't have to be rocket science.
The Habits Academy explains the best way to build better habits in a clear,
easy-to-follow format.

+ Learn how to build habits that stick—no matter how crazy life
gets.

+ Learn how to handle the chaos of life with ease. Learn to anticipate
stumbling blocks and build habits that are ready for anything.

+ Learn how to hold yourself accountable. Learn how to stay
disciplined when boredom and fatigue set in.

+ Learn how to get out of your own way. Learn how to stop being your
own biggest roadblock and prevent self-sabotage.

+ Learn how to overcome your toxic habits. Get strategies to help you
finally quit the bad habits that have been plaguing you for years.

Who teaches this course?

Hi there, I'm James Clear and I'm the creator of The Habits Academy.
I've spent years talking with leading researchers about habit change as well as
reading, writing, and experimenting with my own strategies and explanations
to develop simple and practical ways to build better habits. This course is the
culmination of all that work.
Here is a bit more about me:

+ Over 8 million people read my articles each year and my work has been
featured by CBS, Forbes, TIME Magazine, and more.

+ Over 400,000 people subscribe to my weekly emails on how to form
good habits and break bad ones.

+ Over 5,700 students have taken my habits training programs.

Let me tell you more about what is inside The Habits Academy...
Everything you need. Together in one program.
© Module 1: The Surprising Power of Small Habits
In this module, you'll learn about the core philosophy of this course:
small habits and tiny gains. When we start a new habit, we often think
we need to change our lives overnight. This module will explain why it's
actually smarter to focus on small, gradual improvements. You'll see
just how significant the accumulation of small habits can be.
You'll also learn how habits work, and we'll talk about the cycle (or
loop) that all habits share.
+ Lesson 1: Introduction
+ Lesson 2: The 1 Percent Rule: Why Small Habits Make a Big
Difference
+ Lesson 3: The Habits Loop and How Habits Work
+ Lesson 4: How Long Does it Take to Form a New Habit?
+ Lesson 5: A Simple Plan to Overhaul Your Habits
Module 2: How to Build Habits That Will Last a Lifetime
Module 3: Environment — The Shape of Habit
Module 4: Genetics — The Desire of Habit
Module 5: Master Your Mindset
Module 6: How to Build Feedback Loops and Measure Progress
Module 7: How to Break a Bad Habit
Module 8: Bonus Lessons
You will not find another course like this.
The Habits Academy raises the bar for online courses.
Let me tell you what makes this course different...

+ Get a clear framework anyone can follow. Most courses are “all
parts, but no assembly.” The Habits Academy puts everything together in
one, easy-to-understand program.

+ Skip the jargon, filler, and fluff. This course is designed to get you
results. You'll get everything you need—and nothing you don’t.

+ Optimized for busy people. Every lesson in the Habits Academy is less
than five minutes. Get life-long impact in a few minutes per day.

+ Dive into cutting-edge research (for the nerds). Every lesson is
practical and jargon-free, but if you want to geek out on the latest
research, you'll find a full list of studies in the footnotes beneath each
video.

+ Watch any time and on any device. You can watch the course from
your mobile device, computer, or tablet.

+ Learn at your own pace. Your progress is automatically marked as you
take the course. Revisit lessons whenever you want.

No matter how you measure the quality of a course, The Habits Academy is in a
class by itself. The ideas are scientifically proven. The lessons are practical. And
the format is simple and easy to follow.
